acutally im confused here. we dont actually need .lightfast prefix inside the .lightfast repo.

it should just be github.com/lightfastai/.lightfast/SPEC.md and .lightfast/skills.

the .lightfast prefix is technically the repository. can run run /create_plan to get this fixed, similarly you should ensure we maintain these checks in the new plan and deprecate them from this old one
